title: RetrospectiveEffect
description: A class to specify the retrospective effect exception to the regulatory regime clause of Initial Margin documents as either a normalized value specified as part of an enumeration or a customized value specified of type string.

standardisedException.description: The Standard Initial Margin Model exception when specified by the party according to one of the enumerated values.

asSpecified.description: The Standard Initial Margin Model exception when specified as a customized approach by the party.
